updateNote: Day 61 PM PT refresh — UAE announces exit from OPEC/OPEC+ effective May 1, stripping cartel of 3rd-largest producer. Hezbollah drone kills Israeli contractor Amer Hujairat (44) in Aitaroun, S. Lebanon; son wounded. 2 IDF soldiers wounded by Hezbollah drone. Houthis hit MV Cyclades in Red Sea and MSC Orion in Arabian Sea at record 600km range. US Treasury sanctions 35 entities in Iran's shadow banking. EU sanctions 19 Iranian officials. Guterres at UNSC: 'Open the Strait — let the global economy breathe.' Iran bans steel exports (70% capacity destroyed). War Powers deadline May 1 (2 days). Haredi rioters storm Military Police chief's home — 25 arrested. Brent $111.57 (+39.7%). WTI $100.16 (+32.6%) — tops $100 first time since Apr 10. AAA gas $4.18 (+33.5%). World Bank warns of 24% energy price surge. Hormuz Day 58 effectively closed.
dataFreshnessWarning: Data current as of 5:38 PM PDT April 28, 2026 (Day 61). Next update expected within 6-12 hours.
